job_title: Software QA Engineer II (Full Time) – United States
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Software Quality Assurance, Automated Testing, Software Design, CI/CD, Quality Gates
skill_match_scores: Software Quality Assurance:1.0, Automated Testing:0.5, Software Design:1.0, CI/CD:1.0, Quality Gates:0.0
must_have_quals: Completion within the past 3 years, or current enrollment with expected completion within 12 months, of a certification or relevant degree program (e.g., Associate's, Apprenticeship, Boot Camp, or Certification in a specialized program + 1 year of relevant experience, High School Diploma + 2 years of relevant experience) or Bachelor's + 0 years of relevant experience, Proficient knowledge and hands-on experience with current technologies in the primary technical domain, Demonstrated expertise in developing and executing software design plans, automated scripts, and quality assurance programs, Experience in CI/CD environments, including defining and enforcing quality gates, Ability to work independently, provide mentorship, and collaborate effectively within and across teams
preferred_quals: Advanced knowledge of secure coding principles and threat modeling for software features, Proven experience designing and deploying solutions to test reliability, availability, latency, and performance, Skilled in implementing automation frameworks and conducting complex testing to uncover product defects, Strong background in root cause analysis and recommending corrective actions for software issues, Experience leading projects, mentoring team members, and contributing to cross-functional initiatives
core_responsibilities: Play a vital role in the secure design, build, and testing of software products through systematic testing and automation, Influence the quality of products by contributing to CI/CD processes and defining quality gates, Provide risk assessment and root cause analysis to improve product functionality and reliability, Mentor peers and interns, helping to grow the next generation of technical talent, Collaborate across teams to implement and document best practices that advance end-to-end product quality
job_summary: Cisco is a leading technology company revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect. They are seeking a Software QA Engineer II to ensure the highest software quality through systematic testing and automation, while collaborating closely with product managers and development teams.
